analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files. The current theme appears to be incomplete for a black hole topic with animated objects and slides. The CSS files need enhancement with cosmic/dark themes, animations, and black hole visuals. The HTML files need completion with interactive elements and mobile-friendly navigation. The JavaScript files need fixes for syntax errors and completion of animation/slide functionality.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a dark cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions for an immersive black hole experience.
Complete the HTML with a mobile-friendly navigation menu featuring a hamburger icon, interactive planet sections, animated slides, and structured content about black holes.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and beforeunload event listener, then complete the JavaScript to implement smooth animations, slide transitions, and interactive features.
Add Link imports from 'wouter' for navigation and implement useState hook to manage mobile menu state for better user interaction.
Apply the same dark cosmic theme and animations to the github-page version for consistency across all website versions.
Fix the syntax error in the listFiles function and ensure the JavaScript supports the black hole theme with proper animations and interactions.
Update the docs version with the enhanced black hole theme including animations, cosmic visuals, and smooth transitions.
Fix any syntax errors and complete the JavaScript functionality to support animated slides and interactive elements about black holes.
